hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE '(rm\s+-rf\s+/|git\s+push\s+--force|git\s+reset\s+--hard|DROP\s+(TABLE|DATABASE))'; then echo '{"block": true, "message": "Blocked: destructive command detected. Review and run manually if intended."}'; exit 2; fi

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git\s+commit'; then cwd=$(pwd); if echo "$cwd" | grep -q "$HOME/Projects/"; then proj=$(echo "$cwd" | sed "s|$HOME/Projects/||" | cut -d/ -f1 | sed 's/\.git$//'); last_updated=$(head -10 "$HOME/Notes/Claude/_WorkContext.md" 2>/dev/null | grep '^updated:' | sed 's/updated: *//'); echo "{\"feedback\": \"Commit in project '$proj'. Per vault contract: update ~/Notes/Claude/_WorkContext.md Active Focus for this project if the commit represents meaningful progress. Vault last updated: $last_updated\"}"; fi; fi

vault="$HOME/Notes/Claude/_WorkContext.md"; last_updated=$(head -10 "$vault" 2>/dev/null | grep '^updated:' | sed 's/updated: *//'); today=$(date +%Y-%m-%d); if echo "$last_updated" | grep -q "$today"; then echo '{"feedback": "Session ending. _WorkContext.md was updated today. Verify Next Session Priorities are set and append session entry to SessionLogs if not already done."}'; else echo "{\"feedback\": \"Session ending. _WorkContext.md was last updated: $last_updated (NOT today). If substantive work occurred, you MUST update Active Focus, Next Session Priorities, and append to SessionLogs NOW.\"}"; fi
